name: DynaVap The G3
summary: A low-cost glass-bodied butane-heated vaporiser for microdosing, ideal as a first DynaVap.
description: The DynaVap G3 is an affordable, torch-powered vaporiser with a one-piece borosilicate glass body joining the tip and midsection. The small 0.05g chamber is built for microdosing — efficient and discreet — and the kit arrives with a metal case and a jet lighter, so you can start straight away. It needs no battery and delivers the clean, flavour-led vapour DynaVap is known for. Note it is not compatible with induction heaters, so it is for patients happy with manual torch heating and a little practice on the technique.
